title: Man accused in Molotov cocktail attack of Sam Altman's home opposed AI, court documents say
description: The man accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI founder Sam Altman’s home in San Francisco was opposed to artificial intelligence and had list of other AI tech executives, according to court documents.
content:
SPRING, Texas (AP) — The man accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI founder Sam Altman’s home in San Francisco was opposed to artificial intelligence and had list of other AI tech executives, according to court documents.
Authorities allege... [1754 chars]

title: AI Boom Hits a Wall As Computing Power Runs Short And Costs Surge: Report
description: The artificial intelligence sector is facing mounting strain as explosive usage of advanced AI tools outpaces global computing capacity, forcing firms to limit access, raise prices and rethink
content:
The artificial intelligence industry is increasingly running into a constraint that is no longer theoretical: there simply is not enough computing capacity to match demand.
A recent investigation by the Wall Street Journal highlights how major AI com... [3566 chars]

title: Quote of the day by Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman: “I think everyone gets a little bit caught up in the week-to-week, day-to-day, or the definitions of these abstract ideas. Just focus on…”
description: Tech News News: Artificial intelligence is no longer something that only scientists and tech experts talk about in labs or at conferences. It has slowly become a part.
content:
Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman
Artificial intelligence is no longer something that only scientists and tech experts talk about in labs or at conferences. It has slowly become a part of daily life, changing how people work, talk to each other, shop... [8563 chars]

title: AI Opposition Turns Violent: Molotov Attack on OpenAI Founder
description: Sam Altman, founder of OpenAI, was targeted with a Molotov cocktail attack on his home by Daniel Moreno-Gama, who opposed artificial intelligence. Moreno-Gama later threatened OpenAI's headquarters. The incident highlights tensions around AI technology. Altman urges for reasoned discourse over violent actions in response to AI concerns.
content: An alarming incident unfolded in San Francisco as Sam Altman, OpenAI's founder, faced a Molotov cocktail attack at his residence. The perpetrator, Daniel Moreno-Gama, is reported to hold strong anti-artificial intelligence sentiments, targeting not o... [585 chars]

title: Mythos AI alarm bells: Fair warning or marketing hype?
description: Anthropic postponing the release of its new AI model Claude Mythos, said to be so skilled at coding it could be a wicked weapon for hackers, has encountered a mix of alarm and skepticism. The company is among several contenders in a fierce artificial intelligence race. Promoting the awe of…
content:
Anthropic postponing the release of its new AI model Claude Mythos, said to be so skilled at coding it could be a wicked weapon for hackers, has encountered a mix of alarm and skepticism.
